tools.name: policies.createLifecyclePolicy
tools.description: Creates a policy to manage the lifecycle of the specified Amazon Web Services resources. You can create up to 100 lifecycle policies.

tools.name: policies.deleteLifecyclePolicy
tools.description:
Deletes the specified lifecycle policy and halts the automated operations that the policy specified.

For more information about deleting a policy, see Delete lifecycle policies.

tools.name: policies.getLifecyclePolicies
tools.description:
Gets summary information about all or the specified data lifecycle policies.

To get complete information about a policy, use GetLifecyclePolicy.

tools.name: policies.getLifecyclePolicy
tools.description: Gets detailed information about the specified lifecycle policy.

tools.name: policies.updateLifecyclePolicy
tools.description:
Updates the specified lifecycle policy.

For more information about updating a policy, see Modify lifecycle policies.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags for the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds the specified tags to the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes the specified tags from the specified resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
